marketplace.name: Claude Skills for MCP Research
marketplace.description: All-in-one MCP server research suite with built-in deployment, error recovery, and security scoring. Consolidated from 6 skills into 4 for efficiency.

skills.name: MCP Researcher
skills.description: All-in-one: Research, verify, document, and security-score every attribute of an MCP server. Includes conditional local setup (clone+install if needed) and 7-phase inline error recovery. Consolidated from mcp-researcher + repo-clone + error-handling.

skills.name: Attribute Researcher
skills.description: Deep attribute research with rule enforcement and evidence backing. Called by mcp-researcher when detailed attribute filling is needed.

skills.name: Project Reviewer
skills.description: Review the project or individual skills for alignment with goals, security requirements, and guidelines. Optimized for 41% efficiency gain.

skills.name: Evals
skills.description: Test cases and evaluation framework for measuring skill performance and correctness. Used internally by project-reviewer.

mandates: Never ask for credentials in chat
All credentials handled via filesystem only
Placeholder syntax required for all config examples
No real secrets stored or transmitted
